item.title: Rotator vs. Rogator
item.description: A heavy-duty rotator is called in to recover a Rogator agricultural vehicle from a difficult situation. The video showcases the planning and equipment needed for a safe recovery. Have you ever seen a recovery like this before?

media:content.media:title: Rotator vs. Rogator
media:content.media:description: A heavy-duty rotator is called in to recover a Rogator agricultural vehicle from a difficult situation. The video showcases the planning and equipment needed for a safe recovery. Have you ever seen a recovery like this before?

item.title: Box Truck Crash Recovery and Cleanup
item.description: A recovery crew clears a crashed box truck and removes debris to reopen the roadway. The video highlights the equipment, coordination, and cleanup required after a serious incident. What part of the recovery process interests you most?

media:content.media:title: Box Truck Crash Recovery and Cleanup
media:content.media:description: A recovery crew clears a crashed box truck and removes debris to reopen the roadway. The video highlights the equipment, coordination, and cleanup required after a serious incident. What part of the recovery process interests you most?

item.title: Caught in a Bind? Heavy Recovery at Work
item.description: A heavy recovery team responds to a challenging vehicle recovery, using specialized equipment and careful planning to complete the job safely. What recovery technique do you find most impressive?

media:content.media:title: Caught in a Bind? Heavy Recovery at Work
media:content.media:description: A heavy recovery team responds to a challenging vehicle recovery, using specialized equipment and careful planning to complete the job safely. What recovery technique do you find most impressive?

item.title: Grain Truck Tips Over Blocking Road
item.description: A grain truck overturns and blocks the roadway, prompting a carefully planned recovery operation. The video follows the team's efforts to clear the scene and reopen the road safely. What aspect of heavy recovery work stands out to you?

media:content.media:title: Grain Truck Tips Over Blocking Road
media:content.media:description: A grain truck overturns and blocks the roadway, prompting a carefully planned recovery operation. The video follows the team's efforts to clear the scene and reopen the road safely. What aspect of heavy recovery work stands out to you?

item.title: Forklifts and Fords: Two Recovery Jobs at Once
item.description: A busy day has the recovery team handling both a forklift and a Ford vehicle at the same time. The video highlights coordination, problem-solving, and efficient recovery operations. Which recovery would you tackle first?

media:content.media:title: Forklifts and Fords: Two Recovery Jobs at Once
media:content.media:description: A busy day has the recovery team handling both a forklift and a Ford vehicle at the same time. The video highlights coordination, problem-solving, and efficient recovery operations. Which recovery would you tackle first?

item.title: How Would You Like Your Ford?
item.description: A unique Ford recovery job presents unexpected challenges for the recovery team. The video follows the planning and execution needed to safely move the vehicle. What type of recovery do you find most interesting?

media:content.media:title: How Would You Like Your Ford?
media:content.media:description: A unique Ford recovery job presents unexpected challenges for the recovery team. The video follows the planning and execution needed to safely move the vehicle. What type of recovery do you find most interesting?

item.title: Removing a Jackknifed Trailer from a Busy Road
item.description: A recovery crew works to remove a jackknifed trailer from a busy roadway while minimizing traffic disruption. The video demonstrates the techniques and equipment used to complete the job safely. How would you approach a recovery like this?

media:content.media:title: Removing a Jackknifed Trailer from a Busy Road
media:content.media:description: A recovery crew works to remove a jackknifed trailer from a busy roadway while minimizing traffic disruption. The video demonstrates the techniques and equipment used to complete the job safely. How would you approach a recovery like this?

item.title: Flipped Over Truck Recovery
item.description: A heavy recovery team tackles the challenging task of recovering an overturned truck. The video showcases specialized equipment, careful planning, and the steps required to clear the scene safely. What part of the recovery process interests you most?

media:content.media:title: Flipped Over Truck Recovery
media:content.media:description: A heavy recovery team tackles the challenging task of recovering an overturned truck. The video showcases specialized equipment, careful planning, and the steps required to clear the scene safely. What part of the recovery process interests you most?

item.title: Scale House Shutdown: Broken Trailer Recovery
item.description: A recovery crew responds to a disabled trailer near a scale house, working to safely remove it and restore traffic flow. The video highlights the planning, equipment, and teamwork involved. What recovery challenge would you like to see next?

media:content.media:title: Scale House Shutdown: Broken Trailer Recovery
media:content.media:description: A recovery crew responds to a disabled trailer near a scale house, working to safely remove it and restore traffic flow. The video highlights the planning, equipment, and teamwork involved. What recovery challenge would you like to see next?

item.title: Towing a Stolen Challenger
item.description: A straightforward towing and recovery job involving a stolen Challenger. The focus is on the recovery process and the equipment used to secure and move the vehicle. What would you like to see next?

media:content.media:title: Towing a Stolen Challenger
media:content.media:description: A straightforward towing and recovery job involving a stolen Challenger. The focus is on the recovery process and the equipment used to secure and move the vehicle. What would you like to see next?

item.title: Late-Night Tow Truck Recovery
item.description: A late-night tow truck recovery showing the vehicle rescue process in real-world conditions. The focus is on towing operations and recovery work at the scene. What would you like to see next?

media:content.media:title: Late-Night Tow Truck Recovery
media:content.media:description: A late-night tow truck recovery showing the vehicle rescue process in real-world conditions. The focus is on towing operations and recovery work at the scene. What would you like to see next?

item.title: Everyday Tow, Extraordinary Truck: 2024 Western Star
item.description: A look at the 2024 Western Star in everyday tow work, showing the truck used for recovery and roadside operations. What stands out most about this setup?

media:content.media:title: Everyday Tow, Extraordinary Truck: 2024 Western Star
media:content.media:description: A look at the 2024 Western Star in everyday tow work, showing the truck used for recovery and roadside operations. What stands out most about this setup?

item.title: Trapped
item.description: A recovery team responds to a trapped vehicle situation, using towing and rescue equipment to work through the field operation. The focus is on the recovery process and real-world vehicle rescue.

media:content.media:title: Trapped
media:content.media:description: A recovery team responds to a trapped vehicle situation, using towing and rescue equipment to work through the field operation. The focus is on the recovery process and real-world vehicle rescue.

item.title: Rolled Nissan Recovery in the Wilderness
item.description: A rolled Nissan is recovered from a remote wilderness setting, showing the vehicle rescue process and the kind of equipment used in a real-world field recovery. How would you approach this recovery?

media:content.media:title: Rolled Nissan Recovery in the Wilderness
media:content.media:description: A rolled Nissan is recovered from a remote wilderness setting, showing the vehicle rescue process and the kind of equipment used in a real-world field recovery. How would you approach this recovery?

item.title: Semi and SUV Collision Recovery
item.description: A heavy recovery operation responds to a collision involving a semi-truck and an SUV. The video follows the recovery process, equipment used, and the work required to safely clear the scene. What do you think is the biggest challenge during large-scale recoveries?

media:content.media:title: Semi and SUV Collision Recovery
media:content.media:description: A heavy recovery operation responds to a collision involving a semi-truck and an SUV. The video follows the recovery process, equipment used, and the work required to safely clear the scene. What do you think is the biggest challenge during large-scale recoveries?
